title: Device Settings - Setting change propagation
scenario: Verify that setting changes made in the Lens app are propagated and visible on the hub mobile/desktop app.
steps: Pair and connect the headset to the first device.
Pair the same headset with a second device (phone or desktop).
Start the Lens app on the first device.
Go to Device Settings in the Lens app.
Change values for all available settings.
Check that the changes are reflected on the second device.
expected: All setting changes made on the first device are propagated and visible on the second device (hub mobile/desktop app).
